headline: Agent infrastructure consolidated around tool calling and the Model Context Protocol as Google Cloud shipped a full stack of agent development tooling.
body: Tool calling led the window as a breakout, with Google Cloud detailing its Agent Development Kit and Model Context Protocol integrations across BigQuery, registries, and AI-native databases for orchestrating connected agents. Google DeepMind announced Gemini 3 with expanded context and enhanced multimodal tool use for agentic applications. Evaluation moved alongside deployment, as Meta Superintelligence Labs presented production frameworks targeting concept drift and hallucination detection in multi-step workflows, with concept drift and benchmark also breaking out. New entrants emergent behavior, primitive-action decomposition, and optimization bounds appeared at the edges, while RLHF and optimal transport surfaced as improving techniques.

cited_items.title: Production Evals For Agentic AI Systems - Nishant Gupta, Meta Superintelligence Labs
